title: Resolution Requesting the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw and Other Implementing Bodies for Strict Implementation of All Enacted Municipal Regulatory Ordinances. (AUTHOR (S) : Councilor (s) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Rodora P. Loares, Arlene P. Delos Santos
